title: Midea MRU05M2AWW Upright Freezer, 5.3 Cu.ft, white

cooling_failure:
Awful product - i am returning. I thought it was fine the 1st couple of days. Then checked and it was thawed it was on setting 4. - 6 being the coldest. I lost some meat that couldn't be refrozen
I took some items out let it cool down - put it to setting 6 it was cold for a day and then thawed again.
Do NOT buy.

Mine didn't work at all. It had a loud hum and the back was hot but never got cold. Amazon refused to refund me so I have had to go through the company the past few months to finally get my refund back.

Plugged it in for 3 days and it never cooled. Made lots of gurgling and hissing sounds. Waiting for a replacement from Amazon.

Edited to add that we received the replacement and it works very well. Love the size for our small family and like the organization that the shelves provides!
stopped_working:
Sometimes this worked then would be uexpectedly off. It worked intermittently for 3 months before it quit all together.
If it worked reliably it would have met our needs. But can’t afford to toss so much food!!!
WASTE
It worked great while it lasted..about 18 months and I only used it in my camping cabin about 4 times for a couple weeks at a time. I’ll take the advice of others and only buy brand names.

I had this for a few months, then it stopped working. It worked fine when it did work- but it should have lasted longer.

Of course- past the return time to do anything about it. Stick with a name - brand unit- savings is not worth complete failure.
leak: Door seal leaks at top. Picture is 1 week after defrost and door had not been opened during that time. A big chuck of ice fell off before I took the picture. Temperature control is on the back so you have to pull it away from the wall to adjust it. I am assuming the energy efficiency is not good with the leaking seal. It is too late to return. I didn't know about the problem until I asked my wife

Bought this in late April of 2020. 8 months in I come home to a blood trail leaking from under the door. It had stopped working even though the green light was still lit in the back indicating power to it. I lost $300 in meat as I used it to store ground Turkey, sausage, beef and pork😢
I unplugged it and cleaned it out. My husband plugged it back in and it got cold again. We wait a week befor
noise_vibration: What a waste of money. I didn't open this product for two months so I couldn't return it.  Placed this in my garage. This product is extremely small as well as noisy. It sounds like water constantly running through it but so loud that I keep thinking it is raining outside. I had to turn it off and therefore will have to purchase another freezer. THIS FREEZER ENDED UP IN THE TRASH. THEY WOULDN'T RE
wont_power_on: The freezer came a week late and  when it finally came it didn't work. I lost about $50 worth of food.  3 weeks later and I'm still trying to get the thing returned all in all a very bad experience.

Unpacked it. Plugged it in. Started to him, but kept cycling off and on. Tried several outlets. Never cooled down even a little. Just didn’t stay on. Amazon helped arrange a return shipment, which required a huge effort to repack, and one month later still no refund for the defective appliance.
Returned it , was dented parts were missing and would not turn on. I waited over 5 weeks for it and it was just awful. The sad part was it had good ratings.
physical_breakage: We waited over a month for the freezer to arrive only for it to arrive damaged. The box was perfect, so I'm not sure if I was sent a damaged item on purpose since I got it on sale. I contacted Amazon to request a replacement and I was told that there's no option for replacement. This is very disappointing. We wanted to like this freezer as it fits perfectly in the dedicated space in our garage. I'
